The '''Battle of Aargonar''' took place early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], almost simultaneously with the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==The battle==
The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Aargonar 3 rebel base|base]] on the third moon of [[Aargonar/Legends|Aargonar]] was surprised by the appearance of three [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] on the outskirts of the [[Aargonar system/Legends|system]]. The Rebels went on alert and began loading transports to make an escape from their [[Aargonar 3 rebel base|base]]. X-wing and Y-wing squadrons were sent to cover the transports' jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Meanwhile, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] were landed on the moon, tasked with the capture of Rebel officers and leaders. The ''[[Midnight Star]]'' escaped the system, carrying [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Hamelin]], [[Gruu Dunrik]], and [[Cala Worner]].<ref name="RES" />

==Aftermath==
Though the base was lost, many of the Rebel forces escaped the system and key officers and leaders were spirited away. The Empire had gained only a limited victory.<ref name="RES" /> The troops stationed there fled to a remote asteroid.<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|11|Hamelin}}</ref> As a reward for this success, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gaen Drommel]] would eventually be given commanded of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']].<ref name="Despoilers3" />
